titles.title: He Is Lord, He Is Lord

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He is Lord, He is Lord, He is risen from the dead And he is Lord. Every knee shall bow, Every tongue confess That Jesus Christ is Lord.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are Lord, You are Lord, You have risen from the dead And You are Lord. Every knee shall bow, Every tongue confess That You are Christ our Lord.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He is King, he is King, He will draw all nations to him, He is King; And the time shall be when the world shall sing, That Jesus Christ is King.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He is love, he is love, He has shown us by his life that he is love; All his people sing with one voice of joy That Jesus Christ is love.

verse.name: v5
v6
verse.lines: He will come, He will come, He has promised in His Word that He will come, Some glad day or night with great power and might The risen Lord will come.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Come, Lord, come, Come, Lord, come, You have promised in Your Word that You will come, Some glad day or night with great power and might Oh come, Lord Jesus, come.
